title: limonium × neumanii
intro: Limonium × neumanii, also known as sea lavender or rosemary sea lavender, is a hybrid plant that belongs to the family Plumbaginaceae. It is used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antibacterial effects. The health benefits of Limonium × neumanii include soothing digestive issues, reducing anxiety and stress, and supporting respiratory health. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures to harness its medicinal properties and health benefits.
